title: Hyperliquid, Uniswap and Worldcoin buck crypto slump as traders chase AI, DeFi trends
summary: A handful of tokens continued their run while bitcoin and the rest of the crypto market stalled after the early week bounce.

title: Coinbase intoduces AI advisor, stock options, and pre-IPO markets in finance push
summary: The crypto exchange is expanding into investing, derivatives and banking services as it pursues an all-in-one financial platform.

title: Ripple invests in Flutterwave, pushing its stablecoin and XRP Ledger into payments across Africa
summary: The deal values Flutterwave at $3.2 billion, and will integrate Ripple's RLUSD and the XRP Ledger network to speed cross-border payments across Africa.

title: Coinbase to join tokenized stock race with onchain shares, dividend payments
summary: The crypto exchange said investors will own the shares and receive dividends, underscoring growing momentum behind tokenized securities.

title: Binance says its European regulatory application is compliant despite report of Greek rejection
summary: An EU crypto license application by the world’s largest crypto exchange is set to be rejected by the Greek regulator HCMC, according to a report from Reuters.
